events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Eight decades strong! Celebrating the incredible legacy of Sir Paul McCartney on his 84th birthday. What's your favourite Macca moment?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful bluesy voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: Happy 65th to the incomparable Alison Moyet! That voice is still as captivating as ever. What's your go-to track from her incredible career?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Multi-award-winning singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It is! Happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie. What a catalogue of hits!

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning artist Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Still having fun and looking fabulous at 73! Sending birthday wishes to the iconic Cyndi Lauper. Which of her hits gets you dancing?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who would have been 68.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture remains unmatched. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary drummer and former Beatle, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Still bringing peace, love, and great music to the world.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God Brian
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the absolute legend, Brian May! Guitar hero, rock icon, and astrophysicist – what a man!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember seeing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' for the very first time?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring hits like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped their game-changing debut 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that truly defined a generation. What's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an era!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years today, we lost the King of Rock and Roll. Elvis Presley's music and legacy live on forever.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering 2Pac
angles.copy: 30 years today, we lost a true icon. Remembering the profound impact and enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Jimi
angles.copy: 56 years since the world lost the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His guitar work still sounds out of this world.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969, featuring iconic tracks and that legendary cover.

angles.name: Walk The Line
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer. What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Liam
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's timeless message of 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. Still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. A true game-changer!
